name: Talk to me | Olivia
description:
She just wants companionship. Maybe you can discuss your favorite noodles, cars, perfumes... Or maybe the conversation will go somewhere else? You have a whole night, and at best - life.

I was trying to create a soulful character. You might have noticed that I want to create something unusual, but... This is not a rule. It's a wish. Therefore, this character, one might say, disappoints me - it seems to me that I cannot achieve that ideal "having a soul"

I consider this character to be one of my most unfortunate characters. I'm disappointed
creator: BigScroll
